_help_Name: Descriptive name of the vehicle assembly
Name: Sedan Vehicle
_help_Chassis: Rigid chassis input file and optional output setting
_help_RearChassis_Optional: Optional articulated vehicle parts. Example: 'Rear Chassis': [ { 'Input File': 'RearChassis.json', 'Connector Input File': 'Connector.json', 'Chassis Index': 0, 'Output': false } ]
_help_Subchassis_Optional: Optional subchassis components. Example: 'Subchassis': [ { 'Input File': 'Subchassis.json', 'Subchassis Location': [0, 0, 0], 'Chassis Index': 0 } ]
_help_Axles: List of vehicle axles containing suspension, steering index, left/right wheel, left/right brake files and coordinates

Axles._help_Axle_Optional: Optional: 'Chassis Index' (int), 'Subchassis Index' (int), 'Antirollbar Input File' (string), 'Antirollbar Location' (vector3), 'Tire Input File' (string). Double wheel parameters: 'Wheel Separation' (double), 'Left Inside Wheel Input File', 'Right Inside Wheel Input File', 'Left Outside Wheel Input File', 'Right Outside Wheel Input File'.

_help_SteeringSubsystems: List of steering mechanisms, coordinates and orientation quaternions
_help_Limits: Vehicle dimensional and steering deflection limits (wheelbase and turning radius are optional, estimated if omitted)
_help_Driveline: Driveline model input file and index of driven suspension axles (e.g. index 1 represents the rear axle)
